prose:
The Fukui reactivity analysis of acrolein was performed using DFT at the tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1.

The results indicate that the most electrophilic atom, the site most susceptible to nucleophilic attack, is C4 with a Fukui f+ index of 0.64232.
The most nucleophilic atom, the site most susceptible to electrophilic attack, is O1 with a Fukui f- index of 0.39389.

No warnings were reported by the engine.
